items.title: Speedy Delivery

config.heading: The CannaBiZZ Story
config.content: We started with one goal: make cannabis accessible, fun, and totally legit. No stuffy vibes, no confusing menus — just top-tier bud, real talk from real people, and a shopping experience that actually slaps.

config.heading: What Sets Us Apart
config.subtitle: Six reasons to make CannaBiZZ your go-to

items.title: Lab Certified
items.description: Every batch tested by independent labs for purity and potency.

items.title: Expert Guidance
items.description: Real consultations with licensed cannabis specialists.

items.title: Discreet Packaging
items.description: Plain packaging, no labels. Your business is your business.

items.title: Wide Selection
items.description: Flower, oils, edibles, concentrates — we've got the range.

items.title: Community First
items.description: Built by cannabis lovers, for cannabis lovers.

items.title: Always Fresh
items.description: Small-batch sourcing means you always get the freshest drop.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Hit the 'Get Started' button, book a quick consultation with one of our specialists, and you're good to go. It's free and takes about 10 minutes.

items.question: Is this legal?
items.answer: 100%. We operate fully within South African cannabis regulations. All products are prescribed by licensed healthcare professionals.

items.question: How fast is delivery?
items.answer: Most orders ship same-day and arrive within 1-3 business days, depending on your location. We'll send you tracking info the moment it leaves.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept EFT, credit/debit cards, and select crypto payments. All transactions are secure and discreet.

items.question: Can I return products?
items.answer: Due to the nature of our products, we can't accept returns on opened items. But if there's ever an issue, reach out and we'll make it right.

config.heading: Ready to Elevate?
config.subtitle: Book a free consultation and find your perfect match.
